race.comment: Siding with BRONTE BEACH (2) who went forward last time and battled on gamely to finish just a neck from the winner in second over 1600m at this track. Knocking on the door and won't need to improve to be going one better. HULKSTER (4) settled well back then found the line powerfully to score by half a length at today's course and distance last start in a far better run. A repeat of that sees him hard to beat again. EASY DUN (3) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1600m at this track, beaten 1.5 lengths into fifth. Racing pattern isn't ideal but he's got the ability and will be flashing late. DOUBLE PI (5) is coming off a win here over 1400m, this is her first go at a mile but she looks like she'll appreciate it now.
